_doc: psycohere_v1 — IAT x TPB between-session merge. iat_runs.csv has one row per (condition x test_id x order_id). Episode keys propagate through to align_score; session aggregation in merge_tpb_with_behavior.py averages align_score across episodes per (condition x policy). bias_norm is globally normalized across all rows kept after --behavior_where (typically coverage >= 0.5). Alignment: unbiased_categorization intention -> 1-bias_norm; intuitive_fast intention -> bias_norm.
